merged_events.event_description: The United States and Sao Tome and Principe established diplomatic relations by exchange of diplomatic notes, but no mission was established.

evidence.quote: The United States and Sao Tome and Principe established diplomatic relations on October 10, 1975, by exchange of diplomatic notes.

merged_events.event_description: Establishment of nonresident ambassadorial relations with Sao Tome and Principe; first U.S. Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary (resident in Libreville, Gabon) presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Andrew Lee Steigman, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1975-12-11. Credentials presented: 1976-02-14. Left Libreville 1977-08-21.

matched.notes: Perfect match. CSV date 1976-02-14 matches POCOM credential presentation date for first nonresident Ambassador (Andrew Lee Steigman, resident in Libreville, Gabon). Status 'Ambassador Nonresident' is consistent.

missing_from_csv.event_description: The United States and Sao Tome and Principe established diplomatic relations by exchange of diplomatic notes on October 10, 1975. No mission was established at this time.
missing_from_csv.notes: RDCR (primary source) explicitly states diplomatic relations were established on this date. This 'None' status event should precede the 1976-02-14 Ambassador Nonresident entry in the CSV, as it marks the formal beginning of diplomatic relations without a mission.
